Global Markets Rally Amid Tech Sector Growth

By Jane Doe Updated April 9, 2026
Share on Twitter Share on Facebook

NEW YORK — Markets worldwide saw a significant boost on Thursday, driven largely by stronger-than-expected earnings reports from major technology firms.

The S&P 500 rose 1.2%, while the Nasdaq Composite surged 1.8%, hitting a new all-time high.

Get the Morning Briefing

Sign up to get the latest news delivered to your inbox.

"Investors are realizing that the AI boom is not just a trend, but a fundamental shift in capital expenditure," said John Smith, chief analyst at Financial Group.

Impact on European Markets

Across the Atlantic, the FTSE 100 closed 0.9% higher, bolstered by tech companies listed in London.
